meta.title: Taxbusiness Stockholm | Accounting services in Sweden in Swedish and Spanish
meta.description: Taxbusiness Stockholm helps small and medium-sized businesses in Sweden with bookkeeping, tax returns, annual accounts, payroll and company registration in Swedish, Spanish and English.

home.heroTitle: Clear, reliable and personal accounting services in Sweden.
home.heroText: Taxbusiness Stockholm helps small and medium-sized businesses with bookkeeping, tax returns, annual accounts, payroll and company registration — in Swedish, Spanish and English.
trust: Support in Swedish, Spanish and English
Bookkeeping, tax returns and annual reports
home.introTitle: Business finances should feel clear, not complicated.
home.introText: We help you keep your company finances in order and explain what needs to be done, when it needs to be done and why. The goal is for you to feel secure and focus on your business.
home.servicesTitle: Services that keep everyday business in order
home.servicesText: From company registration to ongoing bookkeeping and tax returns. You get clear information, structured documentation and a responsive point of contact.
home.languageTitle: Advice in the language you feel comfortable with.
home.languageText: For many business owners, finances are easier to understand when they are explained in the right language. Taxbusiness offers support in Swedish, Spanish and English.
home.processTitle: A clear way to start working together.
home.processText: You get a calm and structured start where we review your company’s needs, set routines and explain what needs to be submitted and when.

process.title: First contact
process.text: You briefly describe your company and what you need help with.

process.title: Review
process.text: We look at scope, important dates, VAT periods and existing routines.

process.title: Clear routines
process.text: You know what documents are needed and how communication will work.

process.title: Ongoing feedback
process.text: Questions are followed up in time so your finances do not become something postponed.

home.qualityText: Accounting is about structure and communication as much as numbers. Taxbusiness works with clear reconciliations, simple explanations and personal contact.
quality: Clear information about what needs to be done
Contact in Swedish, Spanish or English
Structure around VAT, tax returns and important dates
Personal feedback from Ana Maria Alvarez
home.pricingTitle: No surprises before the work starts.
home.pricingText: The price depends on your company’s scope, number of receipts and transactions, payroll, VAT period and which parts you need help with. We review your needs first and suggest a suitable setup.
home.fitTitle: For business owners who want close contact.
home.fitText: Taxbusiness is especially suitable for small and medium-sized businesses that want to understand their finances, get quick replies and ask questions in the language that feels most comfortable.
home.aboutTitle: Personal accounting with experience and presence.
home.aboutText: Ana Maria Alvarez helps business owners with accounting, administration and contact with authorities. With clear communication and personal service, she makes company finances easier to follow.
home.ctaTitle: Would you like better order in your company finances?
home.ctaText: Send a request and we will get back to you to explain how we can help.

services.pageTitle: Services for business owners who want clear finances
services.pageText: We help small and medium-sized businesses with accounting, administration, payroll, tax returns and authority contact. You can get help in Swedish, Spanish or English.

startCompany.title: Start a company in Sweden with clear guidance
startCompany.text: Starting a company involves several practical steps. We help with registration, contact with Skatteverket and the administration needed to get started correctly.
startCompany.cta: Want to start a company? Contact us and we will go through what you need to do.

about.title: About Taxbusiness Stockholm
text: Taxbusiness Stockholm is an accounting firm in Solna helping small and medium-sized businesses with accounting, bookkeeping, tax returns and administration.

We place great importance on personal service, clear information and quick replies. Many business owners value getting help in their own language. That is why we offer services in Swedish, Spanish and English.
Our aim is that no company should feel too small to receive professional support.

contact.title: Contact Taxbusiness Stockholm
contact.text: Do you have questions about bookkeeping, tax returns, company registration or payroll? Send a request and we will get back to you.
contact.response: We will get back to you as soon as possible and explain what setup fits your situation.

form.name: Name
form.preferredLanguage: Language I want to be contacted in
form.helpWith: What do you need help with?
form.consent: I agree that Taxbusiness Stockholm may contact me regarding my request.
form.privacy: We use your information only to respond to your request.
form.success: Thank you! We have received your request and will get back to you as soon as possible.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact us by email.
form.rateLimit: You have sent several requests in a short time. Please wait a moment and try again.

privacy.title: Privacy
text: We use the contact details you submit through the form only to respond to your request.
The information is not sold to third parties and is not used for marketing without your consent.
You can contact us if you want to know what information is stored or request that it is deleted.

items.question: Can I get help in Spanish?
items.answer: Yes. Taxbusiness offers help in Swedish, Spanish and English so you can understand accounting and authority contact in a language that feels safe.

items.question: Does my company need to be large to get help?
items.answer: No. The aim is that smaller companies can also receive professional support with clear routines and personal contact.

items.question: How do I know what it will cost?
items.answer: We first review the company’s scope and needs. After that we can suggest a setup before the work starts.

items.question: Can you help with Skatteverket?
items.answer: Yes. Contact with Skatteverket and communication with Swedish authorities are areas Taxbusiness helps business owners with.

footer.summary: A personal accounting firm in Solna for business owners who want clear finances in Swedish, Spanish or English.
